type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: All VOC from wood drying is accounted for in the calculation, including the VOC from bugwood portion of dried wood

80% of kiln dried wood is bug killed wood. Reliable emission factors are not available for kiln dried bugwood. As a result, calculations for VOC emissions from kiln dried wood were based on only 20% of the total production.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: 80% of kiln dried wood is beetle killed wood.(Bugwood). Reliable emission factors are not available for kiln dried bugwood. Calculations for VOC emissions from kiln dried wood were based on 20% of the total production.
